status_notes: Generated from glossary research sweep 2026-05-21; org metadata copied from existing same-org entries under other SecID types.
notes: HITRUST is a healthcare-focused information security and risk management organization. Publishes the HITRUST Common Security Framework (CSF), a control framework that consolidates HIPAA, ISO 27001, NIST SP 800-53, PCI DSS, and other standards.
